batch_summary.note: Nov 13-15 2022 holiday cluster: 3 hostile episodes in 3 consecutive days (EP-0111, EP-0112, EP-0114; 27+5+31=63 total msgs). ADD-003 Thanksgiving temporal window confirmed (Nov 13-15 falls in Nov 20-Dec 1 window adjacent). First multi-episode cluster — trajectory worsening. ARC-RF13-001 promoted to WATCHING. ARC-RF13-002 promoted to ACTIVE (3+ consistent role instances). ARC-RF13-003 WATCHING with second-cluster resistance confirmed.

delta_profile.received_direction: escalating hostile tone with flooding; 3 episodes in 3 days = cluster escalation
delta_profile.net_escalation: elevated (Sev-2: cluster effect — individual episodes Sev-1 but concentrated in 3-day window)
delta_profile.de_escalation_resistance: Eli de-escalates or disengages between episodes; Melissa re-initiates new hostile episode next day

primary_flags.cycle_classification: CYC-003 — holiday temporal window. Nov 13-15 pre-Thanksgiving period. First confirmed multi-episode cluster.
primary_flags.cross_rf_note: Nov 2022 cluster is Phase A escalation onset. Consistent with RF-04 Phase A ramp. Three flooding detections in 3 days indicates sustained hostile initiation from received direction.

arc_updates.event: Nov 2022 cluster: 3 hostile episodes in 3 days. Trajectory escalating — isolated episodes have become sustained clusters. WATCHING state: worsening trajectory pattern emerging.
Nov cluster confirms role consistency across 3 consecutive independent hostile episodes: Melissa = escalator all 3; Eli = de-escalator/disengager all 3. Third+ data point — pattern confirmed.
Melissa re-initiates new hostile episode each day despite Eli disengaging. Classic de-escalation resistance: Eli withdraws → Melissa restarts. 2nd cluster of resistance evidence.
